parameters.rationale: Controls how much prior dialogue is visible to intent and ambiguity diagnostics.
Controls how much historical evidence is required before a multi-turn intent path is trusted.
Controls how many previous turns may contribute query rewrite anchors.
Controls how many real conversation anchors may be inserted into a rewritten query.
Controls how much query expansion beyond the raw query and approved anchors is allowed.
Controls whether the suite is allowed to emit the expected knowledge-search tool call.
Controls how far back multi-turn coreference diagnostics may look.
